da.metaDesc: Se det fulde skema for 4-ugers intensive yogalæreruddannelse. 200-timers program juni 2026 i København.
da.quoteText: Fire uger kan forandre dit liv, hvis du er parat til at vise op helt.
da.ctaSectionDesc: 4 uger, total fordybelse. Book et uforpligtende infomøde eller start din forberedelsesfase i dag.
da.greetingText: Her er dit personlige skema til 4-ugers programmet.
da.conflictTitle: Kan du være der alle dage?
da.conflictDesc: Marker de dage du er optaget — så kan du se hvilke uddannelsesdage der kolliderer.
da.conflictSpecificHint: Har du en bestemt dato, hvor du ikke kan? Tilføj den her.
da.conflictNone: Ingen konflikter — du kan deltage i alle uddannelsesdage!
da.conflictNote: Vi hjælper altid vores studerende med at finde alternativer — info@yogabible.dk · +45 31 52 00 76
da.crossLinkDesc: Se skemaet for vores Vinyasa Plus program (70% Vinyasa Flow + Yin Yoga + Hot Yoga) — juli 2026.

en.metaDesc: See the full schedule for the 4-week intensive yoga teacher training. 200-hour program June 2026 in Copenhagen.
en.quoteText: Four weeks can change your life, if you're ready to show up fully.
en.ctaSectionDesc: 4 weeks, total immersion. Book a no-obligation info meeting or start your Preparation Phase today.
en.greetingText: Here is your personal schedule for the 4-week program.
en.conflictDesc: Mark the days you're busy — and see which training days clash with your schedule.
en.conflictSpecificHint: Have a specific date you can't make? Add it here.
en.conflictNone: No conflicts — you can attend every training day!
en.conflictSome: training day(s) clash with your schedule
en.conflictNote: We always help our students arrange alternatives — info@yogabible.dk · +45 31 52 00 76
en.crossLinkDesc: See the schedule for our Vinyasa Plus program (70% Vinyasa Flow + Yin Yoga + Hot Yoga) — July 2026.
